TextView.android:text:
Nutrition

1.Eat Balanced Meals
Eating balanced meals with proteins carbohydrates and healthy fats helps keep the body strong and healthy.

2.Fruits and Vegetables
Eating fruits and vegetables daily provides vitamins and minerals needed for the body.

3.Whole Grains
Choose whole grains like brown rice and whole wheat bread for better digestion and energy.

4.Protein Foods
Foods like eggs beans and fish help build and repair body tissues.

5.Healthy Fats
Include healthy fats like avocado and nuts for energy and brain health.

6.Limit Junk Food
Avoid too much junk food as it can harm your health over time.

7.Regular Meals
Eating meals at regular times helps maintain energy levels throughout the day.

8.Stay Hydrated
Drinking enough water is important for proper digestion and overall health.
